ctxMarket: Attention is on broad declines across major crypto assets, with Solana down 4% and spot Bitcoin ETFs seeing notable outflows. Solana ETFs posted their first losses since February, and most index constituents are trading lower.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s payment volume growth and record stablecoin activity
• Tokenized stock trading launching on Solana via Kraken’s xChange engine
• The end of Step Finance after a wallet compromise
ctxMatters: Solana’s surge in payment volume and stablecoin usage signals growing network utility despite recent price drops. The launch of tokenized equities trading on Solana expands its use cases beyond crypto. The closure of Step Finance highlights ongoing security challenges for DeFi projects on the network.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Growth in Solana’s payment and stablecoin activity, and new tokenized stock trading options.
Noise: Short-term price swings tied to ETF flows without clear long-term impact.
ctxGlossary:
Tokenized equities — Traditional stocks represented as tokens on a blockchain
Stablecoin — A cryptocurrency pegged to a stable asset, often the US dollar

readMore.title: Bitcoin slips below $68,000 heading into the weekend as dollar posts steepest weekly gain in a year
Kraken launches xChange engine to power tokenized stock trading
